content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File No. M-83-019

Date: Feb. 2, 1983

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Barbara A. Milman

Subject: Telephone Advice to Mike Carter, City Attorney, Gardena, 84308, 1/6/83

A planning commission which holds hearings and makes recommendations is not exempt from Section 84308. The recommendations are decisions (not purely advisory) so votes count under Section 84308.

BAM:plh
